description: Configuration for automated SLURM log publishing to CFS

paths.workdir_root: <pathname to the harvester workdir, right above the panda queue sub-directories>
paths.cfs_destination: <pathname to the CFS directory, where panda queue sub-directories will be auto-created underneath>
paths.state_file: <where do you want the .slurm_publish_state.json to be placed>
